body:
Elena,

You closed your Series B funding in February and currently have 11 open engineering roles, including three AI-adjacent positions. Companies in this stage often find recruiting capacity to be a bigger challenge than budget.

Tenacious runs dedicated engineering squads that can embed with your team and scale your Python and data engineering efforts quickly, typically deploying senior and mid-level engineers within a week.

Would you be open to a 30-minute call next Tuesday or Wednesday to explore if this might be a fit?

Best,
Elena
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
subject: Context: your $14M Series B and the Python team
